CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-21-2013 CONTINUED TO OCT-23-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT HERSH AND HERSH'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO ALLEGE ANY FACTS THAT IT IS A REAL PARTY IN INTEREST UNDER CCP SECTION 367. PLAINTIFF IS GIVEN 10 DAYS LEAVE, IF IT CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH, TO ALLEGE FACTS SHOWING THAT IT IS A REAL PARTY IN INTEREST WITH THE RIGHT TO SUE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2013 Continued To Dec-04-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Sep-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT HERSH AND HERSH's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is granted with leave to amend. Plaintiff has failed to allege any facts that it is a real party in interest under CCP Section 367. Plaintiff is given 10 days leave, if it can do so in good faith, to allege facts showing that it is a real party in interest with the right to sue. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/mjm

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2013 Continued To Oct-23-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Jul-12-2013 Continued To Sep-13-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT HERSH AND HERSH's motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is continued to September 13, 2013, to give the opposing party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The opposing party shall provide a courtesy copy of its papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date by July 31, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
